# CMTimeRangeMakeFromDictionary(_:)

**Function**

Creates a time range from a dictionary representation of its fields.

## Declaration

```swift
func CMTimeRangeMakeFromDictionary(_ dictionaryRepresentation: CFDictionary) -> CMTimeRange
```

## Parameters

- **dictionaryRepresentation**: A dictionary from which to create the time range.

## Return Value

A valid time range structure, or an invalid time range if `dict` doesn’t have the necessary values.

## Discussion

This is useful when getting Core Media time ranges from Core Foundation container types. For keys in the dictionary, see [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/cmtimerange-dictionary-keys].

## Creating Time Ranges

- **CMTimeRangeMake(start:duration:)**: Creates a valid time range with a start time and duration.
- **CMTimeRangeFromTimeToTime(start:end:)**: Creates a valid time range from a start and end time.
